channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-17757] sanity test_230m: onyx-91vm3 crashed during sanity test_230m
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for HUANG XING <hxing@ddn.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/9e313bb5-cf39-4935-b1be-6084da798515

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/104270 - 4.18.0-477.10.1.el8_8.aarch64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/104270 - 4.18.0-513.9.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

[ 9773.657484] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity test 230m: xattrs not changed after dir migration ========================================================== 05:53:36 (1713506016)
[ 9774.015522] Unable to handle kernel NULL pointer dereference at virtual address 00000000000000a0
[ 9774.023027] Mem abort info:
[ 9774.024867] ESR = 0x96000005
[ 9774.026904] EC = 0x25: DABT (current EL), IL = 32 bits
[ 9774.030643] SET = 0, FnV = 0
[ 9774.032733] EA = 0, S1PTW = 0
[ 9774.034796] Data abort info:
[ 9774.036710] ISV = 0, ISS = 0x00000005
[ 9774.039306] CM = 0, WnR = 0
[ 9774.041468] user pgtable: 64k pages, 48-bit VAs, pgdp=000000010b6f3000
[ 9774.046081] [00000000000000a0] pgd=0000000000000000, pud=0000000000000000
[ 9774.050728] Internal error: Oops: 96000005 1 SMP
[ 9774.053971] Modules linked in: lustre(OE) obdecho(OE) mgc(OE) mdc(OE) lov(OE) osc(OE) lmv(OE) fid(OE) fld(OE) ptlrpc_gss(OE) ptlrpc(OE) obdclass(OE) ksocklnd(OE) lnet(OE) libcfs(OE) loop crc32_generic rpcsec_gss_krb5 auth_rpcgss nfsv4 dns_resolver nfs lockd grace fscache crct10dif_ce ghash_ce sha2_ce sha256_arm64 sha1_ce virtio_balloon sunrpc vfat fat ext4 mbcache jbd2 virtio_blk virtio_net net_failover failover virtio_mmio [last unloaded: libcfs]
[ 9774.081249] CPU: 0 PID: 628315 Comm: ldlm_bl_01 Kdump: loaded Tainted: G OE --------- - - 4.18.0-477.10.1.el8_8.aarch64 #1
[ 9774.090097] Hardware name: QEMU KVM Virtual Machine, BIOS 0.0.0 02/06/2015
[ 9774.095081] pstate: 80000005 (Nzcv daif PAN -UAO BTYPE=-)
[ 9774.099172] pc : ll_lock_cancel_bits+0x7b0/0xfa0 [lustre]
[ 9774.103507] lr : ll_lock_cancel_bits+0x54/0xfa0 [lustre]
[ 9774.107543] sp : ffff8000123efb40
[ 9774.109996] x29: ffff8000123efb50 x28: ffff00007f1a0500
[ 9774.113851] x27: ffff00007f1a06b8 x26: 0000000000000000
[ 9774.117679] x25: ffff800001690000 x24: 000000000000fb50
[ 9774.121681] x23: ffff800001690000 x22: ffff00007f1a0500
[ 9774.125570] x21: ffff800009c98788 x20: 0000000000010000
[ 9774.129569] x19: ffff80000218a090 x18: 0000000000000001
[ 9774.133539] x17: 0000000000000000 x16: 0000000000000000
[ 9774.137467] x15: ffffffffffffffff x14: ffff800009c98788
[ 9774.141409] x13: ffff00007cff0000 x12: 0000000000000028
[ 9774.145387] x11: 0101010101010101 x10: 7f7f7f7f7f7f7f7f
[ 9774.149359] x9 : fefeff6b60626e6b x8 : 7f7f7f7f7f7f7f7f
[ 9774.153317] x7 : 5e6b64626d60625e x6 : 0000000000808080
[ 9774.157254] x5 : 0000000000000000 x4 : ffff80000215f340
[ 9774.161231] x3 : ffff80000215f348 x2 : ffff80000215f350
[ 9774.165230] x1 : ffff80000218a090 x0 : ffff00007f1a0500
[ 9774.169223] Call trace:
[ 9774.171058] ll_lock_cancel_bits+0x7b0/0xfa0 [lustre]
[ 9774.175091] ll_md_blocking_ast+0x1d0/0x410 [lustre]
[ 9774.178888] ldlm_cancel_callback+0x74/0x368 [ptlrpc]
[ 9774.183209] ldlm_cli_cancel_local+0x100/0x7a8 [ptlrpc]
[ 9774.187379] ldlm_cli_cancel_list_local+0x118/0x440 [ptlrpc]
[ 9774.191917] ldlm_bl_thread_main+0x920/0xc60 [ptlrpc]
[ 9774.196009] kthread+0x150/0x160
[ 9774.198506] ret_from_fork+0x10/0x18
[ 9774.201182] Code: f9403405 900002c2 aa1603e0 910d4042 (f94050a5)
[ 9774.205813] SMP: stopping secondary CPUs
[ 9774.212798] Starting crashdump kernel...
[ 9774.215557] Bye!
item.summary: sanity test_230m: onyx-91vm3 crashed during sanity test_230m

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
